commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a dropped-media pipeline for failed MEDIA normalization, preserving dropped attachment diagnostics through reply routing, outbound projection, delivery notices, transcript mirroring, logs, and tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main still silently skips failed items in mixed-media normalization and strips media in the catastrophic fallback. I did not run a live Telegram or WhatsApp proof because this review had to keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs author or maintainer follow-up for the blocking findings and missing real behavior proof; automation should not take over while the external proof gate is open.
